title: Dubai's DP World launches premium primary care clinic for residents | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
summary: The facility provides a full range of primary care services, from acute conditions and chronic disease management to preventive health, all delivered in a calm, private clinical environment.
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
UAE — DP World has expanded its healthcare footprint with the launch of The Clinic by The Brain & Performance Centre, a premium primary care service aimed at transforming how residents in Dubai access everyday medical care.

The clinic was developed in response to growing demand for more personalized and integrated care.

Unlike conventional healthcare settings marked by long waiting times and disjointed referral pathways, The Clinic offers unhurried consultations, immediate access, and care tailored to each patient.

Experienced family physicians lead the service, with a strong emphasis on continuity and long-term health management.

The facility provides a full range of primary care services, from acute conditions and chronic disease management to preventive health, all delivered in a calm, private clinical environment.

Integrated care under one roof

What sets The Clinic apart is its direct integration within The Brain & Performance Centre.

Patients can move fluidly between primary care and specialist services without leaving the building, reducing delays and improving health outcomes.

This setup gives clients immediate access to advanced diagnostics, medical imaging, and a multidisciplinary team of specialists, offering a level of clinical depth rarely available in traditional primary care.

Rather than treating health concerns in isolation, the model encourages a proactive and coordinated approach.

Whether a patient is managing a chronic condition or simply looking to maintain long-term health and performance, the connected structure ensures that all treating clinicians work from the same clinical picture.

What the leadership says

Dr. Craig Cook, CEO of The Brain & Performance Centre, described the launch as a deliberate effort to close the gap between what patients expect and what healthcare typically delivers.

“Healthcare should feel simple, seamless, and reassuring—yet too often it is anything but,” he said.

“With The Clinic, we set out to create a primary care experience that reflects the standards people expect in every other aspect of their lives—accessible, thoughtful, and properly connected.”

Dr. Cook added that embedding primary care within The Brain & Performance Centre allows the team to offer something fundamentally different.

Patients benefit not only from skilled family physicians but also from an integrated clinical team working together toward genuinely personalized care.

Redefining accessible healthcare in Dubai

The launch signals a broader shift in how premium healthcare is being reimagined in the UAE, moving away from fragmented, reactive models toward systems that prioritize the patient experience from the very first consultation.

The Clinic by The Brain & Performance Centre is now open and accepting patients in Dubai.
